histoire.title: Our Story
histoire.subtitle: From the heart of the Algerian Sahara
histoire.p1: Timimoun, the jewel of the Algerian Sahara, has for thousands of years been home to talented artisans who weave stories of heritage into every creation.
histoire.p2: RedOasisArtisan was born from a passion for preserving this precious legacy and presenting it to the world. We bridge authenticity and modernity to showcase the finest creations of Saharan craftspeople.
histoire.p3: Every product in our gallery is a unique work of art, embodying the artisan's skill and the depth of Algerian Saharan culture.

product.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

dashboard.imageHint: Upload up to 5 images. First image will be the main product image.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: RedOasisArtisan — A home for Saharan craftsmanship

histoire.title: Our Story
histoire.content: From the heart of Timimoun, deep in the great Algerian Sahara, RedOasisArtisan was born. A project that brings together the authenticity of handcraft with a passion for documentation and connection.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We believe every handmade piece carries the soul of its maker and the memory of its place. Our mission is to bring this creativity to the world and preserve this living heritage.

pottery.name: Pottery
pottery.desc: Saharan clay is shaped by artisans using methods passed down through generations.

weaving.name: Weaving
weaving.desc: Rugs and fabrics in the colors of palm and sand, reflecting the beauty of the desert landscape.

leather.name: Leatherwork
leather.desc: Leather goods tanned using traditional methods — strong, beautiful, and lasting.

palm.name: Palm Crafts
palm.desc: Baskets and household items made from palm fronds by skilled hands.
